basics.name: Louis Boadas
basics.label: Data Engineer | Business Analyst | Data Management
basics.summary: Master's graduate in Data Management (Paris School of Business), combining strong technical skills in data engineering with a sharp business mindset. Expert in designing automated data pipelines, leading data governance initiatives, and translating complex analytics into strategic recommendations. Bilingual French-English.

work.name: Freelance
highlights: Designed a comprehensive Power BI solution for a retail client to track sales performance and competitor pricing.
Automated the consolidation of disparate Excel and CSV data sources, reducing manual reporting time by 15 hours per month.
Developed robust Python web scraping scripts to collect, clean, and monitor real-time market data.
Performed data cleansing and deduplication audits using SQL to prepare client databases for ERP and CRM migrations.

work.name: VINCI Energies
highlights: Architected and deployed Apache NiFi pipelines to automate the processing of 25 million rows, reducing time by a factor of 20.
Designed and optimized multi-department SQL databases (Procurement, HR, IT, Training) to secure strategic data.
Developed a Power BI market-monitoring dashboard, improving buyer productivity by +63%.
Prepared and led data governance workshops for 10 to 15 IT and Business managers.

work.name: La Pizza du Dimanche Soir
highlights: Managed daily operations for a high-volume profit center generating ~€1M in annual revenue.
Awarded Employee of the Month 4 times for operational efficiency.

projects.name: Dynamic JSON Resume & CI/CD Pipeline
projects.description: Developed a standardized, machine-readable resume using the JSON Resume schema to demonstrate Data-as-Code structuring.
highlights: Built an automated CI/CD pipeline (Python, GitHub Actions) to seamlessly update and deploy a live web-based version of the CV.

projects.name: Automated Web Scraper & Data Pipeline
projects.description: Built a robust web scraping tool to collect and monitor real-time market data.
highlights: Extracted, cleaned, and ingested 10k+ rows of daily data into an optimized SQL database (containerized via Docker).
